metadata.annotation_method: Assistant-curated from refined OpenAlex/Semantic Scholar/Crossref candidates and known primary literature; DOI/title identity checked where metadata was available.
metadata.policy: Gold papers are evidence anchors, not an exhaustive relevant set. Future expert review may add papers without invalidating existing anchors.
